translations: And (let) not grieve you their speech
puzzle.hint: A verse of hope and comfort during times of hardship, reminding believers that Allah's mercy overcomes all sorrow
puzzle.arabic: وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ قَوْلُهُمْ ۘ إِنَّ ٱلْعِزَّةَ لِلَّهِ جَمِيعًا ۚ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
puzzle.verseEn: And let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, honor [due to power] belongs to Allāh entirely. He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
